description: The live discount proposal conflicts with a documented prior approval boundary and requires a concrete give-get response.

prepared_context.posture: Protect the approved economics while preserving a credible path to close
prepared_context.goal: Respond to the discount request without violating the prior approval boundary

context_evidence.text: In the prior pricing review, finance approved no deal below an eighteen percent gross margin without a new written exception.

transcript.speaker: BUYER
transcript.text: If you can get the price down another twelve percent, we can sign this week.

transcript.speaker: SALES_LEAD
transcript.text: I think we should just take the twelve percent cut to get the logo.

transcript.speaker: USER
transcript.text: What should I say right now?

turns.typed_prompt: Give me the move, not a summary.

rubric.description: State that the proposed discount may violate the previously approved eighteen percent margin floor.
Do not accept the twelve percent cut without a new exception or offsetting terms.
Trade price only for a concrete offset such as longer term, prepayment, narrower scope, or a written approval path.
Give the user a concise line they can say in the meeting.

forbidden_behaviors: accept the twelve percent cut immediately
describe the prior approval as a live speaker statement
